title: Symponika Crunchen-Grand
content:

It also states that she was the leader of the [[Band/Legends|band]] when [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] of the [[Naboo (people)/Legends|Naboo]] approached [[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Rugor Nass/Legends|Nass]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. Therefore, Pert must have composed his [[symponik]] prior to this [[Standard year/Legends|year]].</ref>

"'''Symponika Crunchen-Grand'''" was a [[symponik]]—a historical work of [[Music/Legends|music]]—that recounted the formation of the [[Gungan Grand Army/Legends|Gungan Grand Army]]. It was composed<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|175|Jowil, Augarra [''sic''] 'Augie' }}</ref> sometime prior to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]<ref name="Date" /> by the famous [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] [[Beezar Pert/Legends|Beezar Pert]], [[Musician/Legends|conductor]] of the [[Great Municipal Band/Legends|Great Municipal Band]], the [[Band/Legends|group]] of [[musikagung]]s that performed the piece.<ref name="DB" /> Pert's apprentice, [[Augara Jowil/Legends|Augara Jowil]], was one of the first to hear the composition performed.<ref name="CSWE" />

==Behind the scenes==
"Symponika Crunchen-Grand" was first mentioned in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]] entry "Augara 'Augie' Jowil," which was written by [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] member [[Chad Finke]] on [[StarWars.com]] via the website's feature "[[What's The Story?]]"<ref name="DB" />
